categories.title: The Onyx Essence
categories.description: Pure. Polished. Timeless. A minimalist staple designed for those who find beauty in simplicity.

categories.title: Earthbound Soul
categories.description: Raw textures meet refined craftsmanship. Each bead tells a story of the earth's natural artistry.

categories.title: Intricate Weaves
categories.description: Strength in every strand. A testament to the patient art of slow-handcrafting.

categories.title: Celestial Duo
categories.description: Two pieces. One soul. Handcrafted combo sets designed to be worn together — or gifted as a pair.
